text:
The commissioner of motor vehicles shall have power to:

(1) Formulate uniform highway safety programs and coordinate the efforts of all interested individuals and agencies engaged in safety-education.

(2) Conduct a highway safety and driver training program, in conjunction with any interested public or private agencies, as an aid to the national defense.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 2
#### Article 2. Dept. of Motor Vehicles
##### § 210 — Highway safety powers and duties

The commissioner of motor vehicles shall have power to:

(1) Formulate uniform highway safety programs and coordinate the efforts of all interested individuals and agencies engaged in safety-education.

(2) Conduct a highway safety and driver training program, in conjunction with any interested public or private agencies, as an aid to the national defense.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: The commissioner of motor vehicles shall have power to:
Formulate uniform highway safety programs and coordinate the efforts of all interested individuals and agencies engaged in safety-education.
Conduct a highway safety and driver training program, in conjunction with any interested public or private agencies, as an aid to the national defense.
